capability_profile.notes: Agent moves by physical force. Jump is modeled as upward force; environment exposes grounded telemetry but does not hard-block midair thrust.

common_failures: Do not lower minimum_acceptance_tier for simple known tasks just to pass validation.
Keep capability_profile controls honest; no teleporting or direct object mutation.
Tier 5 patterns must be physically solved by check_objective(), not just progress-verified.
generation_guidance: Reuse this objective/capability profile shape when the prompt semantics match.
Do not use validator controls outside capability_profile['allowed_controls'].
Expose progress metrics: time_alive_seconds, was_hit, cars_spawned, cars_passed_agent_x, successful_clears, min_distance_to_nearest_car, agent_max_y.

objective_profile.objective_description: Survive for 8 seconds by jumping over sequential oncoming cars without any contact.
objective_profile.success_predicate: time_alive_seconds >= duration_seconds AND no agent-car contact occurred

source_prompt: Agent has to jump over cars that come endlessly, sequentially for 8 seconds.
summary: Survive for 8 seconds by jumping over sequential oncoming cars without any contact. Validated as solved_verified with movement=ground_force, gravity=normal.

physics_relations.intent_summary: A side-view agent must survive for 8 seconds by repeatedly jumping over sequential cars that continuously approach along the ground.

agent.friction_policy: high enough for contact tasks; unrestricted thrust only in zero_g
agent.strength_policy: scale with max scene mass and gravity

phase_gap_steps.why: hazards should not all fall simultaneously

relations.repair: Create dynamic hazards with recurring/staggered motion and enough clearance for visible travel.

safe_lane_count.why: survival must be possible for a simple controller

relations.repair: Leave fair dodge lanes and avoid unavoidable starting contact.

repair_knobs.policy: safe numeric/layout tuning only; preserve prompt semantics
safe numeric/layout tuning only; preserve prompt semantics
safe numeric/layout tuning only; preserve prompt semantics
safe numeric/layout tuning only; preserve prompt semantics

validator_strategy.parameter_policy: validate physical properties such as mass, friction, restitution, gravity, slope, clearance, and impulse before broad regeneration
validator_strategy.repair_unit: failed relation, not failed task template
validator_strategy.template_policy: helpers are optional constructors; relations are the conceptual source of truth

world_context.movement_model: Agent is a force/impulse-driven dynamic body with left/right movement and a discrete jump impulse; cars translate horizontally at constant speed.
world_context.rationale: Prompt describes jumping over cars; a flat lane with periodic moving obstacles is the most direct physical interpretation and validator-friendly.
world_context.support_model: One continuous flat ground plane spanning the play width; agent always has a reliable run-up and landing surface.

verification.reason: Code-level objective satisfied during subgoal validation.
